figures.caption: Fig. 2: Result of local epoch count analysis on CIFAR-10/100.

Fig. 1: Illustration of FAPD featuring three components: (a) server-side hierarchical knowledge decomposition via PCA generating rotation matrix R, (b) consensus-driven adaptive curriculum controller monitoring accuracy history A to determine dimension kt, and (c) client-side progressive knowledge distillation projecting features through Pt to compute multi-objective loss Lc.
